BloodTestRecord.title: Blood Test Record
BloodTestRecord.description: A record of a blood cross-match test for a patient.

patientName.description: The full name of the patient.

patientId.description: The identification number of the patient.

bloodGroup.description: The blood group of the patient.

rh.description: The Rh factor of the patient.

testDate.description: The date when the cross-match test was performed.

result.description: The result of the cross-match test.

qualitySeal.description: The quality seal or code for the test.

responsiblePerson.description: The person responsible for performing the test.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

unitId.description: The ID of the blood unit used.

unitGroup.description: The blood group of the unit.

unitRh.description: The Rh factor of the unit.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the record.

bloodTestRecords.description: Collection of blood cross-match test records.
